opinion.h4: WESTINGHOUSE ELECTRIC CORP. v. VAUGHN ET AL. CERTIORARI TO THE UNITED STATES COURT OF APPEALS FOR THE EIGHTH CIRCUIT No. 82-2042. Argued March 19, 1984 Decided April 30, 1984
opinion.p: James W. Moore argued the cause for petitioner. With him on the briefs were Walter A. Paulson II and Stuart I. Saltman.

Clyde E. Murphy argued the cause for respondent. With him on the brief were Jack Greenberg, James M. Nabrit III, Charles Stephen Ralston, O. Peter Sherwood, Ronald L. Ellis, Judith Reed, and John W. Walker.*

f.p: Robert E. Williams, Douglas S. McDowell, and Barbara L. Neilson filed a brief for the Equal Employment Advisory Council as amicus curiae urging reversal.
The writ of certiorari is dismissed as improvidently granted.
